nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: 旧大陆
nodes.summary: 旧大陆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联19种鸟类，包括大红鹳、Black-necked stilt、领燕鸻等19种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 扇尾沙锥
nodes.summary: 扇尾沙锥（Common snipe，学名 Gallinago gallinago），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于旧大陆、南亚，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

nodes.name: 南亚
nodes.summary: 南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括斑头雁、原雞、蓝胸鹑等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: gallinago }} The common snipe (Gallinago gallinago, formerly also known as Gallinago cælestis) is a small, stocky wader native to the Old World, where it breeds in marshes, bogs, tundra and wet meadows

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is migratory, with European birds wintering in southern and western Europe and Africa (south to the Equator), and Asian migrants moving to tropical southern Asia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: gallinago }} The common snipe (Gallinago gallinago, formerly also known as Gallinago cælestis) is a small, stocky wader native to the Old World, where it breeds in marshes, bogs, tundra and wet meadows

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Populations on the southern fringes of the breeding range in Europe are however declining with local extinction in some areas (notably in parts of England and Germany), mainly due to field drainage and agricultural intensification. The Agreement on the Conservation of African-Eurasian Migratory Waterbirds (AEWA) applies to the species
